title: platytaenia lasiocarpa subsp. thomsonii
intro: Platytaenia lasiocarpa subsp. thomsonii, also known as Himalayan celery, is a plant species belonging to the family Apiaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, including antioxidant, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial activities. The plant is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and digestive issues, due to its health benefits of reducing inflammation and improving immune function. In herbal preparations, the leaves and roots of Platytaenia lasiocarpa subsp. thomsonii are typically used to make teas, infusions, and decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
